headline: Cannabis Theme Rally Powered by Profitability, Not Pure-Play Speculation
summary: Recent cannabis theme strength is driven by large, profitable firms like AbbVie, Altria, and Jazz Pharma, not pure-play operators. These cash-flow giants offer value, momentum, and defensive income.
